data.name: Furry Uncensored
data.detailed_description:
Your search history just became optional. Furry Uncensored grants you access to the "Premium Feeds" of the hottest furry content creators. We all know them—the influencers you see on social media. Now, see what they post when the public stream ends. This is an unapologetically adult arcade game where every win gets you closer to the real reward: explicit, high-quality videos straight from their private collections. No endless grind, no complex dating sim mechanics. Just instant, shameless fun you can enjoy in quick bursts… or long sessions, if you’ve got the stamina.

Gameplay:

  • Straight to the Good Stuff: Simple, casual arcade mechanics you can learn in seconds.

  • Unlock the "Private" Folder: Each completed level instantly unlocks a new explicit scene from a famous furry influencer.

  • The Full Show: Scenes range from playful teasing in the bedroom to full, uncensored action.

  • Subscriber Perks: All offline, no monthly fees, no microtransactions—just one-time entry for pure pleasure.

  • Private Time Optimized: Quick to launch, easy to play with one hand, and perfect for short breaks.

Are you here for the "gameplay" or the "rewards"? Don’t worry, we know why you subscribed.

data.short_description: Access the private archives of top furry content creators. A cheeky, one-handed arcade game where simple wins unlock explicit, uncensored video scenes from your favorite internet stars.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 or later
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHz dual-core CPU (e.g., Intel Core 2 Duo or AMD equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9.0c compatible GPU with 512 MB VRAM (e.g., NVIDIA GeForce 8600 GT or AMD Radeon HD 2600 XT)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound card
